paracetamol.name: Paracetamol
common_uses: Placeholder profile commonly associated with pain or fever discussions; verify indication and patient suitability.
pharmacist_notes: Confirm formulation, strength, route, and maximum daily exposure using approved references.
Check for duplicate ingredient exposure in combination products.
Assess patient-specific risk factors before counseling.
counseling_points: Follow the final pharmacist-approved label directions.
Ask the pharmacist before combining with other medicines that may contain the same ingredient.
Seek pharmacist guidance if directions are unclear.
safety_considerations: Confirm age, allergies, pregnancy status, current medications, and relevant organ-function concerns before use.
